name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

## Feature description

Describe the feature you would like to add.

## Problem it solves

Explain the user problem this feature addresses.

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior and rough implementation idea.

## Alternatives considered

List other options you considered.

## Additional context

Add examples, references, or mockups if available.

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] With guidance
